description: 10-level nested IF/ELSE: WS-X=5 matches the 5th level, sets WS-RESULT=5.
notes: Ten nested IF WS-X = N / ELSE IF chains. Input WS-X=5 falls through levels 1-4 (false) and matches level 5, setting WS-RESULT=5. Tests that the engine correctly handles deeply nested IF/ELSE condition parsing and code generation.
